name: build-ios-apps
description: Build iOS apps with workflows for App Intents, SwiftUI UI work, Simulator mirroring in the Codex in-app browser, performance profiling, leak investigation, and simulator debugging.

interface.shortDescription: Build, refine, and debug iOS apps with App Intents, SwiftUI, and Xcode workflows
interface.longDescription: Use Build iOS Apps to design App Intents and App Shortcuts, build or refactor SwiftUI UI, render SwiftUI previews in the Codex in-app browser, adopt modern iOS patterns such as Liquid Glass, audit runtime performance, capture ETTrace profiles, investigate memory leaks, and debug apps on simulators with XcodeBuildMCP-backed workflows.
defaultPrompt: Build or debug an iOS app with SwiftUI, App Intents, and Simulator.
